In both SMB Request and Response packets

qt: In Wireshark, what symptom indicates the application has failed at the server side?
op: The server closes the connection immediately
The client does not receive any acknowledgment
The client sends a RST/ACK after almost 120 seconds
The TCP handshake fails to complete
ca: The server closes the connection immediately

qt: Microsoft mainly employs a file sharing protocol called ____________________________ on its Windows-based networks.
DNS (domain name system) is a request/response protocol which employs ____________.
Wireshark creates a value called nextseq, which is determined by ______________________________.
op: The Sequence Number field value of each packet
The number of data bytes in the packet
Adding the Sequence Number field value of previous packet to the number of data bytes in current packet
Adding the Sequence Number field value of each packet to the number of data bytes in it
ca: Adding the Sequence Number field value of each packet to the number of data bytes in it

qt: What does a client use to determine the round trip time between hosts during the TCP handshake?
op: The time between the FIN and ACK packets
The time between the SYN/ACK and FIN packets
The time between the SYN/ACK and PSH packets
The time between the SYN and SYN/ACK packets
ca: The time between the SYN and SYN/ACK packets

qt: In the context of a TCP handshake, SYN/ACK packet is used for ________________.
op: To acknowledge receipt of the SYN packet
To request retransmission of lost packets
ca: To acknowledge receipt of the SYN packet
